items.title: Remove Members From Shared Lists
items.description: List owners can now remove members directly from the member list with a confirmation step to prevent accidental removals.

items.title: Safer Membership Management
items.description: Owners cannot remove themselves or the owner account, and access controls are enforced consistently during member removal.

items.title: Improved Member Dialog Experience
items.description: The members dialog updates immediately after successful removals and shows clearer feedback for success and failure states.

items.title: Quality And Stability Updates
items.description: Added coverage for remove-member widget and integration flows, plus analyzer cleanup for healthier test code.
